description:
The same destructive-operation dry-run JSON envelope shape is copy-pasted in 9 places with only payload values changed:

Locations: ops_task_control.rs (87-114, 186-209), ops_workflow.rs (802-822, 1042-1065, 1078-1103), ops_git/worktree.rs (237-263, 455-495, 722-749), ops_git/repo.rs (174-199)

All produce: { operation, target, action, dry_run: true, destructive: true, requires_confirmation: true, planned_effects: [...], next_step: "rerun with --confirm" }

Also related: 5x identical { success: true, message: "task X ..." } response in ops_task_control.rs. And 3x identical { valid, errors, warnings } validation response in ops_workflow.rs.

Solution: Create helpers like `fn dry_run_envelope(operation, target, effects, confirm_hint)` and `fn success_message(msg)` in a shared ops helper module.
title: Extract dry-run confirmation JSON envelope builder (9 copies in ops handlers)
